AAINLP (Applied Artificial Intelligence and Natural Language Processing)

Coordinator

Dr. Öğr. Üyesi Rahim Dehkharghani

Project Team

Doç. Dr. Taner Arsan

Area of Research

AAINLP focuses on developing practical, high-impact AI solutions using modern machine learning and language technologies. Its research spans multiple data modalities, including text, images, audio, and video, with the goal of building multimodal AI systems capable of understanding and interacting with complex real-world knowledge. The main research areas include large language models, natural language processing (particularly in Turkish and English), information retrieval, explainable AI, speech and vision-language models, and data-driven decision support systems.
